content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Found one issue: the review currently shows no source-level implementation work for this bead, only run metadata updates in the `.ralph-burning` project scratch files.

## Amendments

1. This diff does not modify any of the implementation files required by the bead’s acceptance criteria. The only touched files are `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson:256-262` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json:12-29`, which record run bookkeeping only; no changes are present in `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, or `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs` for PID liveness helpers, `run stop`, stale `run status`, stale `run resume` recovery, or SIGTERM shutdown handling.
   Rationale: The goal requires functional lifecycle code changes, but the current patch appears to only update metadata artifacts, so the requested behavior is not implemented in this revision.
